description.from: Deals 446*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+186.1% ATK Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area 3 times, pushing them back, and reduces their ATK Spd by 15% and Magic DEF by 10% for 4sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional 446*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+186.1% ATK Magic DMG.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in frontal range and pushes them back. Reduces hit enemies' ATK Spd by 250 and M.DEF by 30% for 15 sec. Deals additional ??? M.DMG to Non-Hero enemies.

description.from: Deals 608*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+253.4% ATK Magic DMG to 2 enemy and inflicts Bind for 2sec. The damaged enemy takes 18% ATK Magic DoT every 0.5sec for 6sec, and Magic DMG taken is increased by 20%.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to 2 enemies, and shackles them for 6 sec. Hit enemies will take ??? M.DMG over 6 sec and take 30% increased M.DMG for the duration of Skill.

description.from: Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals 338*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+140.8% ATK Magic DMG 5 times. The final hit stuns enemies for 1sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional 338*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+140.8% ATK Magic DMG.
description.to: Draws in nearby enemies towards the center 5 times and deals a total of ??? M.DMG. The last attack stuns enemies for 3 sec. Deals additional ??? M.DMG to Non-Hero enemies.

description.from:
Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150. Each time damage is dealt, applies [Lea's Curse] to the target for 10sec.
[Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by 100, and ATK is reduced by 10%.
description.to: Increases Crit Chance by 150 and each hit inflicts [Curse of Lea] on the target for 10 sec. Targets inflicted with [Curse of Lea] have their Crit Chance reduced by 250 and ATK by 25% for the duration of Skill.

III.to: Crit Chance Boost is increased by 50.

IV.to: Crit Chance Boost is increased by 50.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by 100%.

dark.to: Has a 20% chance of inflicting a 3 sec Shackle.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 2000, but the target is changed to all enemies.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1 and the skill targets 3 enemies.

dark.to: Shackle duration is increased by 1.5 sec.

light.from: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 15% for 10 sec.
light.to: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%.

light.from: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by 10%. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.
light.to: For every 1 target inflicted with [Curse of Lea], Maria's ATK increases by 10%. This effect can be stacked up max 5 times and is irremovable.

dark.from: Reduces the target’s Magic Critical Resistance by 20% for 10 sec.
dark.to: Reduces enemy M. Crit Resistance by 25% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Claw of Restriction] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the affected enemy by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Claw of Restrictions] Increases DMG by 50% and increases M.Weakness of the affected enemy by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Area of Darkness] increases DMG by {0}%, and its last attack reduces the target’s M.DEF by 30% for 7 sec.
description.to: [Area of Darkness] DMG is increased by {0}% and the last attack reduces the target's P.DEF and M.DEF by 30% for 7 sec.

description.from: [Black Wind] Attacks enemies inflicted with Curse of Lea every 10 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to 200% of ATK, and increasing own ATK by {0}% for 20 sec per hit enemy. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.
description.to: [Black Wind] Every 10 sec, attacks enemies affected by Black Wind, dealing M.DMG equal to 200% of ATK. Increases own ATK by {0}% for 20 sec per hit enemy. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.

dark.from: On critical hit, reduces the target’s Status Resistance by 200 for 10 sec, and reduces the cooldown of all skills except the skill in use by 2%.
dark.to: Upon a Crit Hit, target's CC resistance is reduced by 250 for 10 sec, and all Skill Cooldown, excluding the skill in use, is reduced by 2% each.

description.from: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces target's Healing Rate by 35% for 10 sec and increases own Critical Damage by {0}%. The Critical Damage increase effect stacks up to 20 times.
description.to: Upon a Crit Hit, reduces Heal Rate of the target by 50% and increases own Crit DMG by {0}% for 10 sec. Crit DMG increase effect can be stacked up to max 20 times.
